## PiPipeConfig.maxPayloadBytes property

Maximum accepted inbound WebSocket frame size in bytes.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly maxPayloadBytes: number;
```

## Default Value

`1048576` when loaded via `loadConfig()`
